parameters.query:
UPDATE purchase_invoices SET
  lexware_sync_status = '{{ $json.sync_status }}',
  paid_amount = {{ $json.paid_amount }},
  paid_at = CASE WHEN '{{ $json.sync_status }}' IN ('paid') AND paid_at IS NULL THEN now() ELSE paid_at END
WHERE lexware_voucher_id = '{{ $json.lexware_voucher_id }}'
RETURNING id, invoice_number, lexware_sync_status;

INSERT INTO lexware_sync_log (sync_direction, entity_type, lexware_id, action, sync_status, error_message)
VALUES ('pull', 'voucher', '{{ $('Parse Event Data').item.json.lexware_voucher_id }}', 'fetch', 'error', 'API call failed');

parameters.jsCode:
const claim = $input.first().json;
return { json: { status: 'skipped', reason: claim.current_status === 'DONE' ? 'Already processed' : 'In progress' } };
